description.zh: 阿兹特克三方联盟由特诺奇蒂特兰、特斯科科和特拉科潘三个城邦组成，是中美洲最强大的政治联盟。大议长（Huey Tlatoani）作为联盟领袖，与蛇女神官（Cihuacoatl）共同执政。三城各有自治权但在军事和贡赋上协调一致，通过贸易商兼间谍（Pochteca）网络维持情报和经济体系。
description.en: The Aztec Triple Alliance was formed by the city-states of Tenochtitlan, Texcoco, and Tlacopan, constituting Mesoamerica's most powerful political coalition. The Huey Tlatoani (Great Speaker) led the alliance alongside the Cihuacoatl as co-ruler managing domestic affairs. Each city retained autonomy while coordinating military campaigns and tribute collection, supported by the Pochteca merchant-spy network for intelligence and trade.

agents.name: Huey_Tlatoani
agents.title: Great Speaker of Tenochtitlan / 大议长
agents.description: Supreme ruler of the Mexica and first among the Triple Alliance

agents.name: Cihuacoatl
agents.title: Internal Affairs / 内政总管 (蛇女神)
agents.description: Co-ruler managing domestic affairs, taxation, and judiciary

agents.name: Tlatoani_Texcoco
agents.title: Ruler of Texcoco / 特斯科科王
agents.description: Tlatoani of Texcoco, second city of the Alliance, patron of law and arts

agents.name: Tlatoani_Tlacopan
agents.title: Ruler of Tlacopan / 特拉科潘王
agents.description: Tlatoani of Tlacopan, third and junior partner of the Alliance

agents.name: Tlacochcalcatl
agents.title: Supreme Warrior / 最高武士 (军事)
agents.description: Commander of armies, overseer of the warrior orders

agents.name: Pochteca
agents.title: Merchant-Spy / 商人间谍 (情报)
agents.description: Long-distance traders who double as intelligence gatherers
